title: Opening for Production Engineer at MRF

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at MRF
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? MRF in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MRF:
MRF is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MRF!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
